top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm with a Kp index of 5.33 offers a good aurora viewing opportunity for observers above 60° latitude.
top_events.action: Check the skies if you're in high latitudes.

top_events.title: Vega-C Launch - SMILE Mission
top_events.description: The Vega-C rocket will launch the Solar wind Magnetosphere Ionosphere Link Explorer (SMILE) to study Earth's magnetosphere.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for this scientific mission.

top_events.title: Starlink Group 17-42 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 will launch a batch of 24 Starlink satellites to expand the internet constellation.
top_events.action: Tune into the live stream for the launch.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
